## Description

Please include a summary of the change and which issue it fixes.

Fixes #(issue)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would break existing functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test addition or improvement
- [ ] Refactor / code quality improvement
- [ ] DevOps / CI-CD change

## How Has This Been Tested?

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`make test`)
- [ ] Coverage meets threshold (`make test-cov`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`make lint`)
- [ ] Type checks pass (`mypy src/fraudlens/prediction src/fraudlens/explainability api/`)
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] Manual testing performed (describe below)

## Testing Details

Describe any manual or additional testing you performed.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards (black, ruff, isort)
- [ ] I have added tests for my changes
- [ ] All existing and new tests pass
- [ ] I have updated documentation (README, ADRs, API docs) as needed
- [ ] I have added a changelog entry
- [ ] My changes do not introduce new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have checked for potential security issues (input validation, secrets)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Additional Context

Any additional information that would help reviewers understand the change.
